calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Helen Sorep Matley
Atty. Connie Y. Chan appeared for the Petitioner Bao Ling Zhu and also act as her translator.
Petitioner Bao Ling Zhu appeared in proper and was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: BAO LING CHEN.
Decree signed in open court.
